message:
fix(lab/oracle,bin): idempotent finalizer re-registration, loser drain duplicate-complete guard, and runtime-free semaphore scenario

src/lab/oracle/finalizer.rs:
- Make on_register() idempotent for exact-duplicate registrations (same
  id, region, and timestamp): preserve the existing completed/ran state
  instead of treating it as a re-registration that clears history
- Remove dead_code allow on registered_at (now used in duplicate check)
- Add exact_duplicate_registration_preserves_completed_state test

src/lab/oracle/loser_drain.rs:
- Guard on_race_complete() against duplicate completion events: if the
  race_id is already in completed_races, return early to prevent erasing
  the original participant set and losing undrained-loser evidence
- Add duplicate_race_complete_preserves_original_participants test

src/bin/asupersync.rs:
- Replace Runtime/RuntimeBuilder dependency in semaphore cancel-recovery
  scenario with a lightweight poll_once() helper using a noop waker,
  removing the runtime import and avoiding the overhead of spinning up
  a full current-thread runtime for a single synchronous observation
- Add CliNoopWaker, cli_noop_waker(), and poll_once() helpers
- Refactor live_semaphore_cancel_recovery_observation() to use poll_once

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
